headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
headings.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Utilize pure HTML/CSS grids with direct child placements.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px). Sharp edges emphasize the strict/brutalist developer vibe.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all functional text. Center alignment ONLY for high-impact hero headings or standalone warnings.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Retro-Futurism/Terminal style. Solid #121212 background, 1px solid #27272A border. No drop shadows. Use border-yellow-500/50 for active/focus states.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary CTA: bg-yellow-500 text-black font-bold. Secondary: border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-800 text-white.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: Shadcn inputs customized: rounded-none, border-zinc-700, bg-[#0A0A0A], focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-500.

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky header with solid #0A0A0A background and 1px solid #27272A bottom border. Minimal nav links. Right-aligned 'Start Interview' primary CTA.
components_strategy.dashboard: Cardless grid or flat 1px bordered containers. Use Recharts for performance tracking (radar charts for skill progression).
components_strategy.interview_interface: Split pane layout (Resizable panels if possible). Left pane: AI Chat/Grilling. Right pane: Code Editor/Question Box. Strict visual separation.
components_strategy.feedback_modals: Shadcn Dialog. Dark overlays (bg-black/80). High contrast text.

animations.micro_interactions: Instant state changes. Hover triggers a -translate-y-[1px] lift with a yellow border swap. No soft fades.
animations.page_transitions: Framer motion page entrances: opacity 0 to 1 with a quick 0.2s duration. Staggered list reveals.
animations.ai_typing: Blinking cursor `_` at the end of AI responses. 'Glitch' text effect for aggressive grilling mode.

hero_background.description: Abstract flowing shape with dark highlights. Use with a heavy mix-blend-mode or low opacity overlay (bg-black/80) as a hero background texture.

ai_persona_avatar.description: Spooky AI face in darkness. Use for the AI Interviewer profile picture when in aggressive grilling mode.

code_environment.description: Coder workspace filled with dark code environments. Use in the 'Preparation Paths' grid as thumbnails.

brand_logo.description: Audible neon logo. Use as a stylized placeholder for partner logos or tech stack icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST implement this using Tailwind CSS. Map the provided colors as CSS variables in index.css.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto for anything. Import 'Outfit' and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts (or Fontsource).
Implement 'The Control Room' grid for the dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3, gap-4, h-full items. Grid items must be direct children.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with duotone or bold weights.
For the AI Interview component, use a monospace font (JetBrains Mono) for the chat text to simulate a terminal.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY interactive element (buttons, forms, links) using kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='start-interview-btn').
Avoid glassmorphism. Use solid colors and 1px borders (#27272A).
For the code editor component, use a dark theme (like VSCode Dark or Monokai).
Ensure all Shadcn components (tabs, inputs, cards) are overridden to have sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to match the brutalist developer aesthetic.
